overall.description: First-person perspective from a survival video game showing a character walking slowly through tall grass in an open prairie at night. The character holds a lit torch in their left hand that casts warm flickering light on the immediate surroundings while the dark horizon and clear night sky remain visible in the distance.

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through tall grass while holding a lit torch to illuminate the immediate surroundings in the dark field

entered.detail: lit torch held in left hand providing flickering orange-yellow illumination and particle effects
dense tall grass covering the ground, swaying slightly as the character moves through it
dark clear night sky visible above the horizon
dark silhouette of distant terrain or hills barely visible against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily through an open grassland prairie at night, holding a torch that casts warm light on the tall grass immediately ahead. The surroundings are otherwise pitch dark, with only the distant horizon visible under a clear night sky. No other objects, structures, or living creatures are present in the field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady first-person progression through a vast, nocturnal prairie where the only source of visibility is a handheld torch. It begins with the camera moving forward through tall grass, with the flickering warm light of the torch illuminating the immediate path. As the character advances, the golden glow contrasts sharply against the surrounding pitch-black void of the open field. The scene remains focused on this narrow corridor of light before extending toward the distant, dark horizon under a clear night sky.
